about.summary: I'm a builder who thrives in early-stage, ambiguous environments. I like owning problems end-to-end—going from a vague idea to something real that people actually use. Speed, judgment, and quality all matter.

items.title: End-to-End MLOps Pipeline
items.stack: Academic / Production · AWS SageMaker · Kubernetes · MLflow
items.description: Automated ML lifecycle deployment using containerized workflows and Kubernetes orchestration. Integrated MLflow for experiment tracking, reducing manual intervention by 80% and time-to-production by 60%.

items.title: RAG-Based Q&A System
items.description: Engineered RAG system processing 10,000+ documents, achieving 85% accuracy and <2s response latency. Implemented hybrid search with Pinecone for balanced keyword/semantic performance.

items.title: Semantic Search Engine
items.description: Developed semantic search platform for 50,000+ docs with Weaviate, improving relevance scores by 70%. High-performance REST APIs for client dashboards with 99.5% uptime.

items.title: Multimodal AI Assistant
items.description: Deployed Visual Q&A chatbot using CLIP models, achieving 95% accuracy on custom validation. Scaled to 1,000+ daily interactions via Docker + AWS EC2 deployment.

sections.title: 🤖 RAG & AI Infrastructure

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.6: Key Upgrades for Agentic Work
items.excerpt: Claude Opus 4.6 pushes agentic AI forward with real production gains—1M token context, stronger long-horizon tasks, and observability that matters.
items.body:
Claude Opus 4.6 (Feb 5, 2026) pushes agentic AI forward with real production gains. Here's what delivered impact.

1M Token Context Window (Beta)

First for Opus-class. Handles ~750k words without dilution. Retrieval jumps dramatically (76% on MRCR v2 vs predecessor's 18.5%). Align context size to actual usable length—avoid rot.

Stronger Long-Horizon & Multi-Agent Tasks

Plans better, stays on-task longer, sustains complex projects. Agent teams divide work (research preview). Reduced back-and-forth; ideal for multi-step knowledge workflows.

Coding & Knowledge Work Gains

Top scores on Terminal-Bench 2.0, GDPval-AA (beats GPT-5.2 by ~144 Elo), BrowseComp. Better debugging, code review, financial/legal tasks. Self-correction cuts errors.

Observability Tip

Log agent steps, tool calls, outputs from day one. Trace failures back to context loss or bad planning—critical when agents run autonomously.

items.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.3-Codex: Agentic Coding Breakthrough
items.excerpt: GPT-5.3-Codex combines top coding and reasoning in one fast model. Production lessons that mattered.
items.body:
GPT-5.3-Codex (Feb 5, 2026) combines top coding + reasoning in one fast model. Production lessons that mattered.

25% Faster Inference + Long-Task Strength

Handles research, tool-use, extended execution without context drop. Interact mid-task like a colleague. Latency stays low on complex workflows.

Agentic Coding Leadership

56.8% SWE-Bench Pro, 77.3% Terminal-Bench 2.0. Builds games, sites, finds vulnerabilities autonomously. Self-improvement loop (helped build itself).

Professional Breadth

Spans 44 occupations. Production-ready code + knowledge tasks. Sandboxed execution adds safety.

Deployment Note

Start with paid ChatGPT/Codex surfaces. Log interactions early—debug steering fails or tool misuse fast.

items.title: OpenAI Introduces Frontier: Enterprise Agent Management Platform
items.excerpt: Frontier turns AI agents into managed co-workers for enterprises. What works at scale.
items.body:
Frontier (Feb 5, 2026) turns AI agents into managed "co-workers" for enterprises. What works at scale.

Build-Deploy-Manage Pipeline

End-to-end: create agents (OpenAI or third-party), integrate systems, govern at scale. Shared context across agents.

Enterprise Focus

Early customers (HP, Oracle, Uber, etc.). Treats agents like employees—monitoring, security, compliance built-in.

Open Platform Advantage

Mix OpenAI, Google, Anthropic agents. Avoids lock-in; accelerates adoption.

Day-One Practice

Instrument everything: agent logs, decisions, outcomes. When agents fail in prod, trace back to config or data issues instantly.

items.title: Snowflake + OpenAI $200M Partnership: AI-Native Data Insights
items.excerpt: $200M multi-year deal embeds OpenAI models directly in Snowflake. Key production wins.
items.body:
$200M multi-year deal (Feb 2, 2026) embeds OpenAI models directly in Snowflake. Key production wins.

Governed Agents in Data Cloud

Use GPT models via Cortex AI + Snowflake Intelligence. Natural-language queries → auto analysis, no code.

Multimodal & Grounded Insights

Agents pull enterprise data securely. Multimodal support boosts reports, visualizations.

Scale & Governance

First-party integration (not via cloud proxy). Controls access, lineage—meets compliance needs.

Implementation Tip

Log queries, retrieved data, model outputs. Trace hallucinations or bad insights to source data quality or prompt gaps.

items.title: Anthropic Expands Cowork: Custom Agentic Plug-Ins for Departments
items.excerpt: Cowork plug-ins make Claude department-specific. Practical takeaways for customizable workflows.
items.body:
Cowork plug-ins update (late Jan/early Feb 2026) makes Claude department-specific. Practical takeaways.

Customizable Workflows

Define tools, data sources, commands per role (sales, legal, marketing). 11 open-source starters; easy to build/share.

Agentic Automation

Non-coders get specialist agents. Slash commands + sub-agents handle repetitive flows.

Enterprise Efficiency

Reduces manual oversight. Integrates third-party tools (Figma, Asana) directly in Claude.

Observability Must

Track plug-in triggers, agent actions, results. When department workflows break, debug config or data access fast.
